examples: The chicken was perfectly crispy.
I like my bacon extra crispy.
These fries are nice and crispy.
context: I think my trainer would not be too happy after working out so hard this morning, and then getting crispy cream donuts. I'll save my appetite for the food court. Oh, bath and body. We passed by bath and body works, and I had to take a peek at their candles.

examples: She's fluent in three languages.
I want to become fluent in English.
He speaks fluent Korean.
context: I'm surprised because everyone in Busan is so good at English. Everyone's fluent here.

examples: The sunset was absolutely gorgeous.
You look gorgeous in that dress!
What a gorgeous view from the mountain top.
context: Not a good combination. I can't think of a better way to end my perfect day. My stomach ache is suddenly gone. This is gorgeous. I love being on the water and this view, you can't beat it.

examples: The traffic was insane today.
This rollercoaster is insane!
The prices here are absolutely insane.
context: I didn't look at the price tag first and I'm shook. 7,000 Korean won for this baby ice cream. That's insane.

examples: I literally can't stop laughing.
She literally ran a marathon yesterday.
The store is literally around the corner.
context: I'm so full. Everything was really delicious. Malfood in America just can't compare. It's mostly fast food but here everything is gourmet. It's amazing. Now I'm heading to the apple store to hopefully buy some headphones because my headphones right now are hanging on by a thread. They're literally falling apart because I use them so much. I cannot eat. Comfort wise, maybe pizza is better.

examples: I feel nauseous after eating too much.
The boat ride made me nauseous.
She felt nauseous during the flight.
context: Ugh, I've got a little bit of a stomach ache. I feel kind of nauseous and we're getting on a boat.

examples: This song makes me feel nostalgic.
I'm feeling nostalgic about my college days.
The old photos made us all nostalgic.
context: I haven't dined in at a pizza place in forever. I usually just do delivery but when I was a kid it was pretty common to have a pizza party on your birthday so this feels pretty nostalgic and fun.

examples: The cake has a soft, fluffy texture.
I love the crunchy texture of fried chicken.
The texture of this fabric is so smooth.
context: This is big back behavior. I'm such a big back. I heard that fish cake is very popular in Busan and this is my first time trying it. It's so good and it's actually not very fishy at all. I wouldn't know it's fish cake. Let's try the rice cake one. I like the texture of this one. It's a little bit crisp on the outside. The worker recommended this one. She did good and herrilla leaves, all of them are so nice. I think I like the sausage the most though. I'm popping the dumplings with some soy sauce. Wow, these are nice and golden brown on the bottom.
